{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323042006636FEDCD42E0324FD28E"}"},"total":37},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7576943890286953241","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"特别精彩的一本作者继续加油"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764149556,"group_id":"7560473717118077977","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4UETM4cWLUXy3/Yq3z8lL8ZrwtEt38RIBXxWajho5cK","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1488061863326012","user_name":"双塔的比拉星人"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1488061863326012","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7560473717118077977","book_info":{"abstract":"新书刚出评分，所以比较低持续上涨中
【系统】【都市脑洞】【鉴宝】【发展】
考古系研究生林望，被房东无情驱逐，陷入绝境之际，激活了“寻宝系统”。凭借系统赋予的超凡眼力和运气，他迅速从废弃木盒、地摊瓷片和天降陨石中挖掘出价值千万的宝物。林望在短短三天内从穷光蛋摇身变为千万富翁，买下顶级豪宅，随着系统升级，一件件绝世重宝，重新现世，林望也获得了诸多技能，鉴宝大师，修复大师，高仿大牌，雕刻大师……
破获古董造假案，探寻失传的已久的十大宝藏，寻找失落的传国玉玺，一步一步走向巅峰……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/54676644a2363ce7cc019f3841c4b523","author":"时空之灵","author_id":"","book_id":"7560473717118077977","book_name":"寻宝系统：他竟然找到了传国玉玺","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#381800","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":17,"name":"鉴宝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=17&name=鉴宝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":385,"name":"校花","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=385&name=校花&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7560477900307169817","read_count":"17537","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"669795"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.7","serial_count":"282","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,鉴宝,系统,穿越,校花","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ef771f88eb660d499c70fe17d6150740~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779394806&x-signature=86xd%2BidzhrVzy8Lg54gbmubTgCM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"298714817629784","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"84"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323042006636FEDCD42E0324FD28E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读11小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_c
